currentAuditedSlice: Terrain-Aware Hind-Leg Targets / FK Foot Evaluation / Exact-or-Fallback Height Sampling / Authoritative IK Solve / Patch-Stream Revision Coherence / Visible Terrain-Skeleton Frame Proof

selection.reason: Five source and test commits added terrain-aware hind-leg target generation, connected it to the authoritative articulated solve, advanced the pinned Nexus runtime and expanded coverage after the centrally reviewed runtime revision.

interactionLoop: boot loads profile and commit-pinned modules then composes engine physics streaming and presentation
the browser adapter installs an active-patch-or-fallback height sampler
the run tick advances movement and samples the player root height
the procedural gait is adapted and evaluated through articulated forward kinematics
each hind foot samples terrain at its projected world coordinates
weighted rig-space targets feed the authoritative articulated solve
the solved pose body replaces PlayerPose
the browser updates patch streaming after simulation
Three.js renders the current terrain and damped skeleton without a shared terrain-target frame receipt

terrainFootTargetAuthority.mainFinding: Terrain-aware hind-leg IK is simulation-owned, but the scalar height callback, target set, PlayerPose, patch-stream update and visible Three.js terrain/skeleton frame do not share one admitted terrain revision or terminal coherence result.
requiredProof: every accepted terrain sample identifies exact patch or authored fallback source
root and both foot samples share one sampler and patch-stream revision
every accepted target frame cites one source pose rig settings and sample batch revision
the articulated solve and PlayerPose frame cite the accepted target frame
patch activation or release cannot silently change the terrain revision used by the same visible frame
restart and sampler replacement reject predecessor evidence
the first complete visible frame cites matching terrain target pose and presentation revisions
source runtime built-output and Pages fixtures agree
